---
title: Lecture 4 - Q & A
date: 2024-02-01
execute: 
  echo: true
  eval: true
  warning: false
  message: false
from: markdown+emoji
---
```{r setup}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggthemr)
library(hrbrthemes)
library(hexbin)
library(ggforce)
library(skimr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width=8, fig.height=5,
                      echo = T, eval = T, 
                      message=F, warning = F, fig.cap = " ")  

theme_set(theme_ipsum() +
          theme(strip.background =element_rect(fill="lightgray"),
                axis.title.x = element_text(size = rel(1.5)),
                axis.title.y = element_text(size = rel(1.5))
                ))
```



- [REQUIRED] Please leave a comment on whether or not you can render a Quarto document with Python code.
  - If you have issues with rendering it, leave a comment with error messages or symptoms you have.
